#!/bin/bash

# Text processing commands using backticks
# This file demonstrates various text processing commands with backticks

69:echo "Pasted columns:"

=== Text Processing Commands ===

#!/bin/bash

# Text processing commands using backticks
# This file demonstrates various text processing commands with backticks
Lines containing 'echo':
6:echo "=== Text Processing Commands ==="
11:echo "First 5 lines of this file:"
12:echo "$file_content"
16:grep_result=`grep -n "echo" 000__04c_text_processing_commands.sh`
17:echo "Lines containing 'echo':"
18:echo "$grep_result"
22:sed_result=`echo "Hello World" | sed 's/World/Universe/'`
23:echo "Sed result: $sed_result"
27:awk_result=`echo "1 2 3 4 5" | awk '{print $1 + $2}'`
28:echo "Awk sum result: $awk_result"
32:sort_result=`echo -e "zebra\napple\nbanana" | sort`
33:echo "Sorted words:"
34:echo "$sort_result"
38:uniq_result=`echo -e "apple\napple\nbanana\nbanana\ncherry" | uniq`
39:echo "Unique words:"
40:echo "$uniq_result"
44:word_count=`echo "Hello World" | wc -w`
45:line_count=`echo -e "line1\nline2\nline3" | wc -l`
46:echo "Word count: $word_count"
47:echo "Line count: $line_count"
52:echo "First 3 numbers: $head_result"
57:echo "Last 3 numbers: $tail_result"
61:cut_result=`echo "apple:banana:cherry" | cut -d: -f2`
62:echo "Second field: $cut_result"
66:echo -e "1\n2\n3" > temp1.txt
67:echo -e "a\nb\nc" > temp2.txt
69:echo "Pasted columns:"
70:echo "$paste_result"
75:echo -e "apple\nbanana\ncherry" > file1.txt
76:echo -e "banana\ncherry\ndate" > file2.txt
78:echo "Common lines:"
79:echo "$comm_result"
84:echo "File differences:"
85:echo "$diff_result"
89:tr_result=`echo "HELLO WORLD" | tr 'A-Z' 'a-z'`
90:echo "Lowercase: $tr_result"
94:xargs_result=`echo "1 2 3" | xargs -n1 echo "Number:"`
95:echo "Xargs result:"
96:echo "$xargs_result"
